n: Book 14, Chapter 15: The Doom of the North

steps.t: The watch-captain Glorenthol is at Delossad in Tâl Bruinen. You failed to stop Amarthiel, but she was at last defeated at the surprise return of Mordi…
Elrond is in his library at the Last Homely House in Rivendell. The watch-captain has directed you to speak with Elrond regarding your mission to Miro…
